C:\msys64\ucrt64\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\min_example.dir/objects.a
C:\msys64\ucrt64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\min_example.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\min_example.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\msys64\ucrt64\bin\cc.exe -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\min_example.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o min_example.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libmin_example.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\min_example.dir\linkLibs.rsp
